note: LM catalog for the cascade (STT -> LM -> TTS) engine. Change `default` to switch the model every cascade persona uses; add entries to `models` to make more available (no live API list needed). A persona can also pin a model via `lmModelId` in lib/realtime/cascade-agent.ts. `backends[*].envKey` names a fnox/env secret read server-side in app/api/llm/route.ts — values never reach the browser; an empty envKey marks a keyless backend (local server) and no Authorization header is sent. `supportsThinking` sends chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking:false (reasoning models); leave false for APIs that reject unknown fields (Mistral 422s, and the HF router now rejects it with wrong_api_format). HF models pick an inference provider with a `:provider` suffix (e.g. `:fastest`, `:cerebras`). The `local` backend expects `mise run lm-local` (llama-server, port 8001); its model id must match the server's --alias. See README 'Configuring the cascade LM'.
